beginner.title: Question Words
beginner.content:
📌 Quy tắc QWASI
Thứ tự từ trong câu hỏi Hiện tại đơn là QWASI:
• QW: Question Word (Từ để hỏi: What, Where...)
• A: Auxiliary (Trợ động từ: Do, Does...)
• S: Subject (Chủ ngữ: you, she...)
• I: Infinitive (Động từ nguyên mẫu: live, work...)

Trong câu hỏi Yes-No, chúng ta không dùng từ để hỏi (QW):
• Do you speak English?
• Does she live here?
📐 Câu hỏi với AM / IS / ARE
Khi động từ chính là be, chúng ta dùng am/is/are làm trợ động từ đứng trước chủ ngữ. Thứ tự là QWAS:
• (Question Word) + Am/Is/Are + Subject
• Where is your sister?
• Are you free?
📐 What + Noun
Chúng ta thường dùng What + danh từ để hỏi cụ thể:
• What colour is your jacket?
• What size do you want?
• What car does he have?
📐 How + Adj / Adv
Dùng How + tính từ/trạng từ để hỏi mức độ:
• How often do you play sports?
• How old is your sister?
• How tall is he?
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ What she does do? → ✅ What does she do?
❌ Where he works? → ✅ Where does he work?
❌ How old your sister is? → ✅ How old is your sister?

exercises.exp: Hỏi tần suất dùng How often
Hỏi màu sắc dùng What colour
Hỏi sức khỏe/trạng thái dùng How
Hỏi người ở cùng dùng Who
Hỏi thời gian bắt đầu dùng When
Hỏi kích cỡ dùng What size
Hỏi chiều cao dùng How tall
Hỏi giá tiền dùng How much
Hỏi số lượng dùng How many

exercises.q: ___ (How/Who) often do you wash your car?
exercises.exp: How often: bao lâu một lần

exercises.q: ___ (Who/What) did you see at the park?

passage.text: Every morning, I meet my friend. {{1}} is your name? I ask a new student. {{2}} do you live? He says he lives near the park. {{3}} do you come to school? He says he walks. {{4}} old are you? He is ten years old. {{5}} is your birthday? It is in May. {{6}} do you like English? Because it is fun. {{7}} is your favourite subject? He loves music. {{8}} often do you practice? Every day. {{9}} many instruments can you play? Two. {{10}} is your teacher? Mr. Smith.

At the airport, the officer asks many questions. {{1}} is your passport? {{2}} are you from? {{3}} are you visiting our country? {{4}} long are you staying? {{5}} is your hotel address? {{6}} much money do you have? {{7}} is your job? {{8}} did you travel with? {{9}} was your flight? {{10}} will you return home?

In the interview, they ask: {{1}} do you want this job? {{2}} did you hear about us? {{3}} can you start? {{4}} is your greatest strength? {{5}} well do you speak English? {{6}} many years of experience do you have? {{7}} was your last boss? {{8}} do you see yourself in five years? {{9}} is your expected salary? {{10}} can we contact you?

At the doctor's office: {{1}} is the problem? {{2}} did it start? {{3}} does it hurt? {{4}} often do you feel this way? {{5}} is your temperature? {{6}} old are you? {{7}} do you live? {{8}} is your phone number? {{9}} can I help you today? {{10}} is your regular doctor?

Planning a party: {{1}} shall we invite? {{2}} is the best date? {{3}} time should it start? {{4}} are we having it? At my house. {{5}} food should we buy? {{6}} many people are coming? {{7}} is the music? {{8}} will buy the drinks? {{9}} much will it cost? {{10}} are you so excited?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi sử dụng các từ để hỏi khác nhau (Who, Where, When, What time, How often) để phỏng vấn một người bạn mới.
writing_prompts.example: Who is your favourite singer? Where do you live? When is your birthday? What time do you go to bed? How often do you play sports?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn ngắn (khoảng 5 câu) hỏi về thông tin cá nhân của một người nổi tiếng mà bạn yêu thích.
writing_prompts.example: What is his real name? Where was he born? How old is he now? Why is he so famous around the world? When did he start his career?

writing_prompts.vi: Tưởng tượng bạn đang ở một thành phố mới, hãy viết 5 câu hỏi để hỏi đường hoặc hỏi thông tin về thành phố đó.
writing_prompts.example: Where is the nearest bus station? How far is it from here? What time does the museum open? How much is a taxi to the airport? Who can help me with the map?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi về thói quen ăn uống của một người bạn.
writing_prompts.example: What do you usually have for breakfast? How often do you eat fast food? Where do you usually have lunch? Who do you cook with? What time do you have dinner?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi để hỏi về kế hoạch nghỉ hè của gia đình bạn.
writing_prompts.example: Where are we going this summer? When will we leave? How are we going to travel? Who is going with us? How long are we staying there?

beginner.title: Adverbs of Frequency
beginner.content:
📌 Trạng từ chỉ tần suất
Dùng để nói về mức độ thường xuyên của một hành động:
• Always: 100% (Luôn luôn)
• Usually: 90% (Thường xuyên)
• Often: 70% (Hay làm)
• Sometimes: 50% (Thỉnh thoảng)
• Hardly ever: 10% (Hiếm khi)
• Never: 0% (Không bao giờ)
📐 Vị trí trong câu
• Trước động từ thường: I always get up early.
• Sau động từ TO BE: She is often late.
• Trong câu phủ định: Đứng sau don't/doesn't (I don't often go out.)
• Trong câu hỏi: Đứng sau chủ ngữ (Do you always eat breakfast?)
⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng
• Never và Hardly ever mang nghĩa phủ định nên KHÔNG dùng kèm 'not'.
❌ I don't never eat meat. → ✅ I never eat meat.
• Các cụm từ dài (every day, once a week...) thường đứng cuối câu.
✅ I go to the gym every day.
I usually go to bed at 10 PM.Tôi thường đi ngủ lúc 10 giờ tối.
He is never late for school.Anh ấy không bao giờ đi học muộn.
We go to the cinema twice a month.Chúng tôi đi xem phim hai lần một tháng.

exercises.opts: I often am tired,I am often tired,Often I am tired,I am tired often
exercises.exp: Trạng từ đứng sau to be

exercises.opts: He never eats meat,He doesn't never eat meat,He eats never meat,Never he eats meat

exercises.q: Do you ___ go to the gym?
exercises.exp: Trong câu hỏi, trạng từ đứng sau chủ ngữ
Cụm từ chỉ tần suất đứng cuối câu

exercises.opts: She doesn't usually drive,She usually doesn't drive,She doesn't drive usually,Usually she doesn't drive

exercises.exp: Cụm từ chỉ tần suất đứng cuối câu

exercises.q: We ___ (never) go to school on Sundays.

exercises.exp: Sau chủ ngữ trong câu hỏi
Sau chủ ngữ trong câu hỏi

exercises.q: I go to the park ___ (once a week).

exercises.exp: Sau chủ ngữ trong câu hỏi
Sau chủ ngữ trong câu hỏi

passage.text: My daily routine is very consistent. I {{1}} get up at 7 AM because I love mornings. I {{2}} have a big breakfast, but {{3}} I only have a coffee if I am in a hurry. I {{4}} walk to work, about four times a week. My boss is {{5}} late; he is always on time. We {{6}} have meetings on Mondays. I {{7}} eat lunch at my desk; I prefer the cafeteria. In the evening, I {{8}} go to the gym. I {{9}} watch TV before bed. I {{10}} go to sleep before 11 PM.

My friend Sarah has a busy life. She {{1}} travels for work. She is {{2}} at home during the week. She {{3}} calls me on weekends. We {{4}} go to the cinema together. Sarah {{5}} eats fast food because she loves healthy cooking. She {{6}} exercises in the morning. She is {{7}} tired after work. We {{8}} talk for hours. She {{9}} forgets my birthday. She is {{10}} a great friend.

In our family, we {{1}} have dinner together. My father {{2}} cooks, but my mother {{3}} helps him. We {{4}} talk about our day. My brother {{5}} washes the dishes; he hates it! We {{6}} watch a movie on Fridays. My parents {{7}} go out at night. We are {{8}} happy to be together. We {{9}} argue about small things. Family is {{10}} important to us.

At school, I {{1}} arrive early. I {{2}} do my homework on time. My teacher is {{3}} kind to us. We {{4}} have tests on Fridays. I {{5}} fail my exams because I study hard. We {{6}} play games in class. The library is {{7}} quiet. I {{8}} borrow books. My friends are {{9}} helpful. School is {{10}} interesting.

On holidays, we {{1}} go to the beach. We {{2}} stay in a hotel. I {{3}} swim in the ocean. My sister {{4}} sunbathes. We {{5}} visit museums. The weather is {{6}} sunny. We {{7}} eat local food. We {{8}} take many photos. We {{9}} want to come home. Holidays are {{10}} too short!

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thói quen hàng ngày của bạn sử dụng ít nhất 5 trạng từ chỉ tần suất khác nhau.
writing_prompts.example: I always get up at 6 AM. I usually have breakfast at home. I often walk to work, but sometimes I take the bus. I never go to bed late during the week.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thói quen của một thành viên trong gia đình bạn.
writing_prompts.example: My mother always cooks delicious meals. She usually goes shopping on Saturdays. She often visits her friends. She hardly ever watches TV and she never smokes.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về những việc bạn làm vào cuối tuần.
writing_prompts.example: On weekends, I usually sleep until 9 AM. I often go out with my friends for coffee. Sometimes we go to the cinema. I always visit my grandparents on Sundays. I never work on weekends.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thói quen học tập của bạn.
writing_prompts.example: I always do my homework after dinner. I usually study in the library. I often listen to music while studying. Sometimes I study with my friends. I hardly ever fail my tests.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thói quen ăn uống lành mạnh của bạn.
writing_prompts.example: I always drink a lot of water. I usually eat fruit and vegetables. I often cook at home. Sometimes I eat a little chocolate. I never drink soda.

beginner.title: Word Order in Questions
beginner.content:
📌 Quy tắc QWASI
Thứ tự từ trong câu hỏi tiếng Anh thường tuân theo quy tắc QWASI:
• Q: Question Word (Từ để hỏi: What, Where...)
• W: (Auxiliary) Word (Trợ động từ: Do, Does, Is, Are...)
• A: (Subject) Agent (Chủ ngữ: you, she, they...)
• S: (Main Verb) Subject (Động từ chính: live, go, work...)
• I: Infinitive (Động từ nguyên mẫu)
📐 Với động từ TO BE
Thứ tự là QWAS (không có động từ chính ở cuối):
• (Question Word) + Am/Is/Are + Subject + ...?
• Where is your sister?
• Are you a student?
📐 Với động từ thường
Dùng trợ động từ Do/Does:
• (Question Word) + Do/Does + Subject + V (nguyên mẫu)?
• What do you do?
• Does she live here?
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ Where she lives? → ✅ Where does she live?
❌ What time she gets up? → ✅ What time does she get up?
❌ Are you live here? → ✅ Do you live here?
Do you speak English?Bạn có nói tiếng Anh không?
Where does he work?Anh ấy làm việc ở đâu?
Why are you angry?Tại sao bạn lại giận dữ?

exercises.opts: How often you go,How often do you go,How often you do go,How often go you
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc QWASI: QW (How often) + A (do) + S (you) + I (go)

exercises.opts: What time does she get up,What time she gets up,What time she does get up,What time gets up she
exercises.exp: QW (What time) + A (does) + S (she) + I (get up)
Với to be: QW + be + S
Hỏi về nguồn gốc với to be

exercises.opts: Does he do,He does,Do he does,Does he does
Why do you want,Why you want,Why you do want,Why want you
do they have,they have,they do have,have they
are you,you are,do you be,free are you
exercises.exp: Với to be: QW + be + S

exercises.opts: is your sister,your sister is,does your sister be,is sister your
Is your friend,Your friend is,Does your friend be,Is from Canada your friend
exercises.exp: Yes/No question với to be: Be + S

exercises.opts: do you live,you live,does you live,live you
Does she speak,She speaks,Do she speak,She does speak

exercises.exp: Hỏi về sở thích: QW + A + S + I
Câu hỏi trạng thái dùng to be

exercises.opts: are they,they are,do they be,are them

exercises.exp: A (does) vì lesson là số ít
Present continuous: QW + be + S + V-ing
Hỏi vị trí dùng to be
Tính từ open dùng to be

passage.text: Meeting a new person: {{1}} do you do? I am a designer. {{2}} do you work? In the city centre. {{3}} you like your job? Yes, I love it. {{4}} is your office? It is on the 5th floor. {{5}} you have any colleagues? Yes, I have three. {{6}} often do you travel? Once a month. {{7}} is your boss? She is very nice. {{8}} you speak other languages? Yes, I speak Spanish. {{9}} you married? No, I'm single. {{10}} old are you? I'm 28.

At the hotel: {{1}} can I help you? I want a room. {{2}} many nights are you staying? Three nights. {{3}} is your name? John Smith. {{4}} you have a reservation? No, I don't. {{5}} is the room price? It's $100. {{6}} is breakfast served? From 7 to 10. {{7}} is the gym? On the top floor. {{8}} I pay by card? Yes, of course. {{9}} is the Wi-Fi password? It's 'guest123'. {{10}} you need anything else?

Asking about a friend: {{1}} is your best friend? His name is Tom. {{2}} did you meet? At university. {{3}} he live near you? Yes, he does. {{4}} often do you see him? Every weekend. {{5}} is he like? He is very funny. {{6}} you go out together? Yes, we do. {{7}} is his hobby? He likes football. {{8}} old is he? He is 25. {{9}} is his favourite food? Pizza. {{10}} you have his phone number?

In the classroom: {{1}} is the teacher? She is in the office. {{2}} time does the class start? At 9 AM. {{3}} you have a pen? Yes, here it is. {{4}} page are we on? Page 12. {{5}} you understand the lesson? Yes, I do. {{6}} is the homework? Exercises 1 to 5. {{7}} we have a break? Yes, in ten minutes. {{8}} is your partner? It's Maria. {{9}} do you spell this word? S-T-U-D-Y. {{10}} is the exam?

Shopping: {{1}} can I help you? I'm looking for a shirt. {{2}} size do you need? Medium. {{3}} colour do you prefer? Blue. {{4}} is the changing room? Over there. {{5}} it fit you? Yes, it's perfect. {{6}} much is it? It's £20. {{7}} you have a smaller one? Let me check. {{8}} is the manager? He is busy. {{9}} I pay in cash? Yes. {{10}} is the exit?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi sử dụng các từ để hỏi khác nhau (Who, Where, When, What time, How often) để phỏng vấn một người bạn mới.
writing_prompts.example: Who is your favourite singer? Where do you live? When is your birthday? What time do you go to bed? How often do you play sports?

writing_prompts.example: What is his real name? Where was he born? How old is he now? Why is he so famous around the world? When did he start his career?

writing_prompts.example: Where is the nearest bus station? How far is it from here? What time does the museum open? How much is a taxi to the airport? Who can help me with the map?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi về thói quen ăn uống của một người bạn.
writing_prompts.example: What do you usually have for breakfast? How often do you eat fast food? Where do you usually have lunch? Who do you cook with? What time do you have dinner?

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi để hỏi về kế hoạch nghỉ hè của gia đình bạn.
writing_prompts.example: Where are we going this summer? When will we leave? How are we going to travel? Who is going with us? How long are we staying there?
